title: Glass Apothecary Jars, Clear Candy Bowl Dishes Holder Elegant Storage Buffet Display, Decorative Wedding Candy Organizer Canisters (Height: 14" Body: 4")
description:
About this item
☛High Quality☚ These footed classic style apothecary jars are made from high-quality clear glass which allows the contents of the jar to be easily seen without moving the lid. DIMENSIONS: The large jar measures approximately 14 inches height x 4 inches diameter
☛Clear Glass Lid☚ This elegant apothecary jar has a separate clear glass lid with a round handle for easy opening and closing
☛Perfect Size☚ Sized to hold everything from decorations such as flowers, fruits, sand and seashells, and other dry decorations to kitchen storage such as dried pasta, grains, candy, biscuits, fruits, etc
☛Multi Function☚ This glass apothecary jar not only used it as bathroom storage to store cotton, baths salts and soap, it can be used as kitchen storage to store dried pasta, grains, spices, candy, snacks, biscuits, fruits etc.
☛Make a Centerpiece☚ Showing off the candy buffet bar with our glass apothecary jars, this Tall Glass Apothecary Jar really stands out on your candy store countertops
☛Event Use☚ Use this beautifully lidded jar to create a fun centerpiece for your events such as wedding, Valentine's Day, housewarming, birthday, dinner parties, etc
☛Gorgeous Decoration☚ This large glass Apothecary jar is versatile and also can be used with decor items. It looks great with petals, water, sand, pine cones, maples leaves or flowers to add jubilant energy flows into your environment
Show more
reviews_5s: Sooooo cute!!!Love it.It is just what l wanted to display candy. ElligantI bought this as a gift and with some shells, pebbles and a bit of glitter and a seahorse ( which I bought on Amazon ) turned this into a great feature in the bathroom . So many ways to make this personalized and funHad lots of trouble finding a nice big apothecary jar out in the retail stores. This jar was just what I was looking for. Great big size, came fast, packed very well.Gorgeous! Very elegant and classy look for a posh lobby display. Would buy again.I have been using this as a terrarium and it works great.Nice tall glass candy dish. I wanted to replace a similar acrylic dish and it is perfect.absolutely love this jar. compliments kitchen very nicely.I've been on the hunt for an apothecary jar to add to my coastal decor (filled with shells and faux sand) and this did not disappoint! Great quality for a fraction of the price I was going to spend at one of the home decor stores. Highly recommend!
reviews_1s: The lid is slides everywhere. Very cheap and thin glass. I would not recommend buying this!I wanted to use this as a terrarium, but the lid didn't fit. It kept slipping to one side. I ended up returning it.Was smaller than the picturePoor quality glass. Far too many air bubbles trapped in the glass. Returned.
